name: cleankeys
title: CleanKeys
description: Control CleanMyKeyboard app — lock your keyboard for cleaning and unlock it when done
author: xlr-01

commands.name: start-cleaning
commands.title: Start Keyboard Cleaning
commands.subtitle: cleanKeys
commands.description: Opens CleanMyKeyboard and locks your keyboard so you can safely clean it

commands.name: stop-cleaning
commands.title: Stop Keyboard Cleaning
commands.subtitle: cleanKeys
commands.description: Stops the cleaning mode and re-enables your keyboard

commands.name: toggle-cleaning
commands.title: Toggle Keyboard Cleaning
commands.subtitle: cleanKeys
commands.description: Toggles cleaning mode on/off — assign Cmd+Esc to this for quick access
